holdings.infoBox: URNM is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cameco stock at 21.98%, Sprott Physical Uranium Trust Units at 13.82%, NexGen Energy at 12.39%, National Atomic Company Kazatomprom JSC at 4.92%, and Denison Mines at 4.74%.

overview.description: The Sprott Uranium Miners ETF (URNM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the VettaFi Global Uranium Miners index, a market-cap-weighted index of global companies in the uranium industry. URNM was launched on Dec 3, 2019 and is issued by Sprott.
